checks.description: Cross-tenant balance leak: outsider reads owner-pro /billing/balance
checks.notes: Correct 403 with clear membership error message.

checks.description: Cross-tenant balance leak: outsider reads owner-pro /billing/credits
checks.notes: Correct 403 with clear membership error message.

checks.description: Analytics requires workspace membership: outsider reads owner-pro project overview
HTTP URLs rejected for MCP connectors

controlTest.notes: HTTPS URL correctly accepted; test connector cleaned up (DELETE 200).

checks.notes: Initial test had wrong payload (missing scope), which also returned 400 but for Zod schema reason. Retested with complete payload including scope — 400 with explicit HTTPS enforcement message. HTTPS control returned 201 as expected.

checks.description: System feature flags protected from deletion
checks.responseBody: {"error":"System feature flags cannot be deleted","hint":"Use PATCH /admin/features/:key { enabled: false } to disable."}
checks.notes: Correct 403 with helpful hint directing admin to use PATCH instead of DELETE.

additionalProbe.notes: Wrong secret also returns 200 — secret validation not implemented.

checks.notes: Endpoint returns 200 with presence data regardless of whether X-Internal-Secret is present or incorrect. The fix for BUG-EDITOR-002 is NOT live on dev-ws.doable.me. This is a live security gap — the internal presence route is publicly readable.

checks.description: Admin projects search and pagination work
checks.expectedBehavior: Returns filtered subset, not all projects
checks.notes: Search correctly filters by query string. Returns 2 matching projects, not all 48. Pagination field 'total' present.

summary.overallVerdict: PARTIAL — 6/7 fixes confirmed live; BUG-EDITOR-002 WS presence auth is NOT enforced
